LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PRINCIPAL AMOUNT - $12,307.55). PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189
